query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A radial burst of flowers radiating outward from a central point, with pink blooms at the core surrounded by rings of red, white, and purple blossoms against green foliage and brown soil, viewed from directly above in a circular garden bed.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A radial burst of flowers shot with extreme motion blur streaking outward from a central point, creating explosive radial lines that smear the pink core blooms, red and white surrounding flowers, green foliage, and brown soil into dynamic blurred rays radiating from the center of a circular garden bed.
